title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
